entries.definition:
كتاب الميم

مضغ

(مضي) الميم والضاد والحرف المعتلّ أصلٌ صحيح يدلُّ على نفاذٍ ومُرورٍ. ومَضَى يَمضِي مُضِيَّاً. والمَضَاء: النَّفاذ في الأمر. والمُضَوَاء: التقدُّم.

قال القطامي:

* فإذا خَنَسْنَ مَضَى على مُضَوائِهِ *

m–ḍ–y to go, to leave, to pass; to continue, to go by; to
execute a task; to expire, to die; to be sharp; to come to pass; to
complete a deal. Of this root, two forms occur five times in the
Qur’an: مَضَى maḍā four times and مُضِيّ muḍiyy once.

مَضَى maḍā i [v. intrans.] 1 to go, to keep going; to spend (time)
(18:60) وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَى لِفَتَاهُ لَا أَبْرَحُ حَتَّى أَبْلُغَ مَجْمَعَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ أَوْ أَمْضِيَ حُقُبًا
and when Moses said to his servant, ‘I will not desist [from
journeying] until I reach the place where the two seas meet, even
if I go on for years 2 to pass by; to come to pass, to become a
norm, to become established (8:38) قُلْ لِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا إِنْ يَنْتَهُوا يُغْفَرْ لَهُمْ مَا قَدْ
سَلَفَ وَإِنْ يَعُودُوا فَقَدْ مَضَتْ سُنَّةُ الْأَوَّلِينَ tell those who disbelieve that if
they desist, what went before will be forgiven them, but if they
return [to their disbelief], then [they should know what to expect
because] the example of [dealing with] those who went before
has already been established.

مُضِيّ muḍiyy [v. n.] the act of proceeding, going on, moving
forward (36:67) وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَمَسَخْنَاهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ

887

مع

and had We willed, We would have transmuted them in their
places, so that they could not move forward or back.

m–ḍ–y to go, to leave, to pass; to continue, to go by; to
execute a task; to expire, to die; to be sharp; to come to pass; to

and had We willed, We would have transmuted them in their
